crawler_boundary_rule.crawler_core: Crawler_Core collects raw evidence only; raw links are not added_seeds.
crawler_boundary_rule.desktop_import: Desktop_Import on Ubuntu Desktop converts pre-ranking into real ranking / final rank.
crawler_boundary_rule.parse_core: Parse_Core may create added_seeds after taxonomy/source-context pre-ranking.

fiata_shared_host_policy_note: FIATA country pages are grouped shared-host seed surfaces and require gated per-language activation plus host-budget politeness before any live frontier insert.
language_modeling_note: `zh` is the language code for Chinese; `CN`, `HK`, and `TW` are region/country surfaces, not taxonomy language codes.
